overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing first-person driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at dusk. The player drives under massive overpasses, collides with blue industrial barrels, and navigates through multi-lane streets surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture and glowing digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with neon-lit commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: driving straight under the massive concrete overpass toward a blue car visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: blue car driving ahead in the same direction under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered corridor overhead
tall commercial building with illuminated 'softsys' signage in green neon
distinctive cylindrical tower wrapped in bright green neon lights with Asian architectural elements

segments.scene_description: Driving under a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city district, with the Softsys building visible on the left and a distinctive green neon tower on the right. The road stretches ahead toward a distant blue vehicle, with the scene illuminated by mixed natural dusk light and artificial neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with hazardous material barrels

events.description: vehicle collides with cluster of blue industrial barrels blocking the road

agents.ego_description: slowing down and colliding with blue barrels placed in the driving path, coming to a stop

entered.detail: cluster of blue industrial barrels with orange hazard symbols blocking the roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and collides with a cluster of blue industrial barrels placed in the middle of the road under the overpass, coming to a stop near the obstacles. A 'JAPANTOWN' location notification appears on the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with pagoda-style commercial structures

events.description: vehicle turns right around the green neon tower to enter main thoroughfare

agents.ego_description: navigating around the barrels and making a sharp right turn past the green neon tower

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past the intersection

entered.detail: rusted yellow metal guardrail running along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Maneuvering around the barrels, the vehicle turns right onto a wider street, passing closely by the illuminated green tower with traditional Asian architectural elements mixed with neon. The sky opens up as the camera exits the covered underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway corridor with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the multi-lane road passing under elevated highway structures and digital advertisements

entered.detail: massive elevated highway with bright linear lights running underneath
large illuminated advertising screens displaying various products and brands

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wide multi-lane arterial road beneath elevated highway structures, surrounded by towering digital billboards and the returning Softsys building visible on the left. Multiple vehicles pass by in both directions under the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: road median with landscaping and construction barriers

events.description: vehicle drives onto the center road median to navigate around traffic

agents.ego_description: driving onto the center median of the highway, passing trees and construction barriers while avoiding main traffic

entered.detail: landscaped trees with reddish foliage growing on the road median
concrete divider separating the highway lanes with red painted surface
temporary orange construction barriers stacked on the right side of the median

segments.scene_description: The vehicle moves onto the center median, navigating between concrete barriers and passing landscaped trees with orange construction barriers visible on the right. The Softsys building remains visible in the distance to the left as the camera approaches a more vegetated area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a neon-lit urban district that transitions from a confined concrete underpass to a wide, open arterial road. It begins beneath a massive overpass flanked by the Softsys building and a green neon tower, moving toward a distant blue vehicle under the mixed glow of dusk and artificial light. As the vehicle collides with a cluster of blue industrial barrels, the scene briefly halts before maneuvering around the obstacles and turning right, passing the traditional Asian architectural elements of the green tower as the sky opens up. The camera then expands into a multi-lane thoroughfare beneath elevated highways, surrounded by towering digital billboards and passing traffic. Finally, the vehicle shifts onto the center median, navigating between concrete barriers and landscaped trees while the Softsys building recedes into the distance.
